page_metadata.biotools__summary:
a web server of reduced amino acid alphabet for sequence-dependent inference by using Chou's five-step rule.

Recently, the success of AlphaFold on creating 3D protein models demonstrates sequence-dependent inference plays a crucial role in computational proteomics.

A web server of reduced amino acid alphabet for sequence-dependent inference
